CREATE TABLE timestamps (start TIMESTAMPTZ, end TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT age(end, start) AS time_difference FROM timestamps WHERE start < end;
SELECT age(MAX(end), MIN(start)) AS overall_difference FROM timestamps;
CREATE TABLE events (event_start TIMESTAMPTZ, event_end TIMESTAMPTZ);
SELECT age(e.event_end, e.event_start), e.event_start FROM events e WHERE e.event_end > e.event_start;
WITH time_diff AS (SELECT age(end, start) AS diff FROM timestamps) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM time_diff WHERE diff IS NOT NULL;
SELECT age( (SELECT end FROM timestamps LIMIT 1), (SELECT start FROM timestamps LIMIT 1));
CREATE TABLE interval_timestamps AS SELECT age('2022-01-01 10:00:00+00', '2021-01-01 10:00:00+00') AS duration;
SELECT * FROM interval_timestamps WHERE duration IS NOT NULL;
